hero.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
hero.author: Theodore Roosevelt

aries.general: Today is a great day for new beginnings, Aries. Embrace the changes coming your way.
aries.love: Romantic sparks may fly unexpectedly. Stay open to new connections.
aries.career: Your innovative ideas could be recognized at work. Share them proudly.

taurus.general: Patience will serve you well today. Don't rush into decisions.
taurus.love: Communicate your feelings clearly to enhance your relationships.
taurus.career: Steady progress is on the horizon; keep your efforts consistent.

gemini.general: Social interactions bring new opportunities today. Get out and mingle.
gemini.love: Expect a thrilling twist in your love life. Enjoy the excitement!
gemini.career: A collaboration could lead to impressive results at work. Team up!

cancer.general: Focus on self-care today. Nurture your emotional well-being.
cancer.love: Sharing your thoughts with a loved one will deepen your bond.
cancer.career: Your intuition is sharp. Trust it while making professional decisions.

leo.general: Your confidence shines bright today, Leo. Use it to pursue your goals.
leo.love: Passion fills the air; express your feelings boldly.
leo.career: Opportunities for leadership may arise. Take charge with grace.

virgo.general: Attention to detail pays off today. Complete pending tasks with care.
virgo.love: Listen to your partner's needs; understanding is key.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills will help you solve workplace challenges.

libra.general: Seek balance today in both personal and professional realms.
libra.love: A romantic gesture could strengthen your relationship.
libra.career: Networking may lead to exciting prospects; reach out.

scorpio.general: Introspection will lead you to clarity. Embrace solitude.
scorpio.love: Trust plays a significant role in your relationships today.
scorpio.career: Your determination can help you overcome obstacles at work.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls to you today; explore new experiences.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity in your romantic life could lead to memorable moments.
sagittarius.career: A fresh perspective may open doors. Keep your eyes peeled.

capricorn.general: Focus on your long-term goals today. Stay committed.
capricorn.love: A shared vision with a partner can strengthen your bond.
capricorn.career: Your hard work won't go unnoticed. Recognition is coming.

aquarius.general: Innovative ideas will flow easily today. Embrace your creativity.
aquarius.love: Connecting with someone on a deeper level is possible now.
aquarius.career: Collaborative efforts can spark innovation. Join forces.

pisces.general: Your sensitivity is heightened today. Use it to connect with others.
pisces.love: A profound emotional connection may develop in your love life.
pisces.career: Creative solutions to challenges will lead to success today.

professional.text: Opportunities come to those who take action.
professional.author: Unknown

professional.text: Success is the result of preparation, hard work, and learning from failure.
professional.author: Colin Powell

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are. Know that there is something inside you that is greater than any obstacle.
professional.author: Christian D. Larson

professional.text: Your work is going to fill a large part of your life, and the only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: Don't limit your challenges. Challenge your limits.
motivation.author: Anonymous

motivation.text: Success isn't just about what you accomplish in your life; it's about what you inspire others to do.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Push yourself because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: It's not whether you get knocked down, it's whether you get up.
motivation.author: Vince Lombardi

captions.text: Live the life you have imagined.
captions.author: Henry David Thoreau

captions.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
captions.author: Walt Whitman

captions.text: The best time for new beginnings is now.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
captions.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
captions.author: C.S. Lewis

captions.text: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
captions.author: Lao Tzu

tech.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
tech.author: Alan Kay

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: What we need is more people who specialize in the impossible.
tech.author: Theodore Roethke

tech.text: The future is already here—it's just not very evenly distributed.
tech.author: William Gibson

tech.text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
tech.author: John Johnson

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me Kit Kat ads!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I'm reading a book on anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Did you hear about the mathematician who’s afraid of negative numbers? He will stop at nothing to avoid them.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Why don’t skeletons fight each other? They don’t have the guts!
fun.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: There is no greater power than faith in the world.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: In every change, in every falling leaf, there is some pain, some beauty. And that's the way new leaves grow.
faith.author: Rumi

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: The greater the obstacle, the more glory in overcoming it.
wisdom.author: Molière

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein
